title: lib/output/committer/manifest
description:
The lib/output/committer/manifest directory is responsible for handling the manifest file output in the Hadoop MapReduce framework. It collaborates with the ManifestPrinter.java file to load the manifest file from a given path and print its contents. The architectural role of this directory is to provide a way to output manifest data in a readable format.

The directory uses the Apache Hadoop MapReduce library and the Java IO library to perform its core logic. It takes a path to the manifest file as input and outputs the contents of the manifest file.
